rationale: DSM implements door opening command processing with precondition checks
DSM implements 2oo2 position sensor voting for fully-open detection
DSM implements opening timeout fault detection (4.0s)
DSM implements door closing command processing with obstacle gate
DSM implements 2oo2 × 2oo2 voting for closed-and-locked state
DSM implements closing timeout fault (10.0s)
OBD implements obstacle retry logic (3 attempts max)
DSM commands lock engagement after fully-closed confirmation
SKN generates departure interlock signal to TCI when all doors locked
DSM monitors and re-commands lock engagement while moving
DSM implements operational mode FSM (NORMAL/SELECTIVE_DISABLE/DIAGNOSTIC/SAFE_STATE)
DSM enforces mode transition authorization checks
FMG implements selective door disablement with safety interlock preservation
DSM diagnostic mode entry requires speed=0 and authorization
DSM continuously monitors door position every 20ms cycle
TCI transmits per-door status to TCMS every 100ms
FMG continuously monitors fault conditions every 20ms cycle
DGN logs fault events to non-volatile storage (1000+ entries)
SPM monitors speed and generates speed_interlock_active flag
DSM gates door open commands on speed interlock
SKN commands and maintains door locking when speed > 5 km/h
TCI receives CAN speed data with CRC-16 and timeout detection
SPM defaults to moving on CAN timeout (>200ms)
OBD polls obstacle sensors every 20ms with ISR response <1ms
OBD issues reversal command within 100ms of obstacle detection
OBD monitors motor current via HAL ADC for force limit
DSM implements 2oo2 sensor voting for LOCKED state
SKN withholds departure interlock until all DSMs confirm locked
SKN verifies cross-channel lock state agreement every 20ms via SPI
SKN oversees CRC-16-CCITT (0x1021) on all safety-critical structures
DSM implements position sensor timeout detection (100ms)
SKN triggers safe state with 2oo2 channel confirmation
FMG maintains speed interlock active during selective disablement
HAL implements hardware watchdog refresh (50ms timeout)
SKN implements cross-channel software watchdog (20ms cycle)
TCI validates CRC-16 on all CAN messages and rejects on fail
All components use static memory allocation only (no malloc)
SKN implements memory integrity check (boot + every 100ms)
DSM detects emergency release with 60ms debounce and TCMS alert
DSM latches emergency release until maintenance reset
FMG logs selective disablement with TCMS authorization
Static cyclic executive ensures WCET ≤ 16ms per 20ms cycle
SPM completes speed interlock response within 100ms
OBD issues obstacle reversal within 150ms of detection
DSM issues motor start within 200ms of command
SKN transmits locked status to TCI within 100ms
HAL provides PWM motor control (20kHz) and direction GPIO
HAL reads position sensors via GPIO (2oo2 per door)
HAL reads obstacle sensors via interrupt + polling
HAL controls lock actuators via GPIO (24V solenoid)
HAL reads lock sensors via GPIO (2oo2 per lock)
HAL refreshes hardware watchdog within 40ms
TCI receives TCMS CAN messages with CRC-16 validation
TCI transmits door status CAN messages with CRC-16
HAL exchanges DDU commands via RS-485 (115.2 kbit/s)
SKN exchanges cross-channel state via SPI every 20ms
SPM mitigates door opens while moving via speed interlock
SKN enforces speed interlock with 2oo2 confirmation
OBD mitigates door closes on passenger via obstacle detection
DSM mitigates false lock indication via 2oo2 sensor voting
SKN cross-channel comparison prevents false departure signal
DSM mitigates loss of position indication via sensor timeout
FMG classifies faults to prevent spurious safe state
HAL implements watchdog refresh to detect software failures
TCI mitigates CAN speed data loss via timeout detection
SKN implements memory integrity checks (CRC + stack canary)
DSM handles emergency release with latching and logging
FMG enforces selective disablement authorization and logging
SKN implements SPI transient filter (3-cycle confirmation) to prevent denial-of-safe-operation
